findings.summary: Sunrise Textiles Pvt Ltd is a Surat-based textile manufacturer established in 2001, exporting to EU markets. No adverse regulatory filings found.
findings.source_title: Surat Textile Exporters Show Strong Growth in FY24
findings.raw_snippet: Surat-based Sunrise Textiles reported steady export growth to EU markets, maintaining quality certifications.

findings.summary: Indian textile sector showing moderate growth with government PLI scheme support. No sector-level red flags.
findings.raw_snippet: India's textile and apparel exports reached $35.4 billion. Government PLI scheme driving capacity expansion in technical textiles.

findings.summary: No MCA filings, NCLT cases, or SFIO investigations found against Sunrise Textiles Pvt Ltd or its directors.
findings.raw_snippet: No adverse filings found in MCA records for Sunrise Textiles Pvt Ltd.
